name: learning-pruner
prompt: Scan all files in vault/learnings/ and read their YAML frontmatter. Find entries where: (1) last-seen is older than 90 days from today, AND (2) status is 'new' or 'resolved' (NOT 'promoted' — never archive promoted learnings). For each qualifying entry: update the status field in the YAML frontmatter to 'archived'. Report how many entries were archived. Do NOT delete any files — only change the status field.
